name: Tigris Object Storage
what_it_does: S3-compatible globally distributed object storage with automatic multi-region replication and zero egress fees.
use_cases: Drop-in replacement for AWS S3 using existing boto3 or AWS SDK code
Storing and serving user-uploaded files with automatic geo-distribution
Reducing egress costs when serving assets to global users
Multi-region backup and disaster recovery storage
CDN-like asset delivery without configuring a separate CDN
not_for: Block storage or database use cases requiring low-latency random writes
Teams needing AWS-native features like S3 Select or S3 Batch Operations
best_when: Best when you want S3-compatible object storage with automatic global replication and zero egress fees, especially for globally distributed applications.
avoid_when: Avoid when your workload depends on AWS-specific S3 features not covered by the S3 compatibility layer.

auth.notes: Uses AWS-style access key ID and secret access key pairs, fully compatible with AWS SDK credential configuration.

pricing.paid_tiers: $0.02/GB storage/month, zero egress fees on all plans
pricing.notes: Zero-egress-fee model is a key differentiator vs AWS S3. No charge for data transfer out.

performance.rate_limits: No published per-account rate limits; infrastructure scales automatically

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Returns standard S3-compatible XML error responses, well understood by existing tooling.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: S3 PUT operations are fully idempotent by design.
known_agent_gotchas: Must configure endpoint URL to point to Tigris instead of AWS in SDK config
Not all S3 advanced features (Select, Batch) are supported

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced on all endpoints. AWS-style HMAC signing for request authentication. Built by ex-Apple engineers with security-first design.
